onboarding.step2Subtitle: We match you with people in your area first.
onboarding.step3Subtitle: Pick 5–12 things that actually describe you. This is how we match.
onboarding.step4Subtitle: Three prompts. All required. No curated nonsense — just you.
onboarding.step5Subtitle: They stay blurred until you've had a real conversation. Add up to 4 — at least 1 required.
onboarding.photosBlurNote: All photos blurred until chat unlock.

dashboard.emptyDesc: We're still building out your neighbourhood. Check back soon — or share Unhinged so more locals join.
dashboard.loadError: Could not load matches. Please refresh.

waitlist.heroSubtitle: No ghosts. No filters. No bullsh*t. Personality-first matching for Montreal singles who actually show up.
waitlist.vibeCheckPlaceholder: Describe your vibe in one line
waitlist.vibeCheckWarning: Whoa, that's too tame! St-Henri vibes need at least 10 chars. Get unhinged 🔥
waitlist.formDisclaimer: St-Henri gets priority access. No spam, ever.
waitlist.successSubtitle: We'll be in touch when St-Henri beta opens. You'll be one of the first to know.
waitlist.shareTitle: Know someone tired of getting ghosted?
waitlist.shareText: Share Unhinged — the more people in your neighbourhood, the faster we launch.
waitlist.errorDuplicate: This email is already on the list.
waitlist.validationVibeCheckMin: Vibe check must be at least 10 characters
waitlist.validationHotTakeMin: Hot take must be at least 10 characters
